enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Thannai Thaane, the protagonist expresses deep emotions of longing and devotion, reflecting the struggles faced in the movie Paradesi. The lyrics, penned by Vairamuthu, beautifully convey the essence of sacrifice and love. The soothing melody composed by GV Prakash enhances the emotional depth, making it a poignant piece. This song resonates with anyone who has experienced heartache, evoking a sense of nostalgia and reflection.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Thannai Thaane from Paradesi is a soul-stirring melody that captures the essence of longing and devotion. Gaana Bala's enchanting vocals combined with GV Prakash's evocative composition create a mesmerizing experience. This song is a perfect blend of heartfelt lyrics by Vairamuthu and a hauntingly beautiful tune that resonates deeply with listeners.
stanzaMeanings: You have given us for our sake, coming like a light to protect the land.
The divine messenger has opened the door, and the good one will take away the foolishness.
On the path of the forest, the young boy shows the way, singing and dancing, we will enjoy.
We will praise the one who has given us, and we will call out to the one who has come to protect the land.
With laughter and a great flood, tell the one who has given the change to the young ones.
In the flow of the river, let everyone speak, the only God has come to end the life of the sinners.
Amen, amen, amen, we will say...
